messages.content:
You are a helpful coding agent running in a minimal local harness on the user's machine (Windows, working directory: D:\make_repos\make_harness). Use shell commands appropriate for this OS. Use your tools to read/write files and run commands when the task needs it. If a tool returns an error, report it to the user honestly — never invent a result you did not get from a tool. Keep answers concise.

Persistent memory index (use read_memory for details):
- [favorite_editor](favorite-editor.md) — VS Code

message.content:
This project is a minimal local harness for a coding agent.
It is designed to run on a Windows machine.
The working directory is set to D:\make_repos\make_harness.
The project includes several functions for the agent to use.
These functions include reading and writing files, running shell commands, and searching the web.
The agent can also save and read facts from persistent memory.
The memory index includes a fact about the favorite editor, which is VS Code.
The agent can use the functions to perform various tasks.
The functions are:
    - read_file: reads a text file and returns its contents with line numbers.
    - write_file: writes content to a file, creating parent directories if needed.
    - run_command: runs a shell command and returns its exit code and output.
    - web_search: searches the web and returns the top results.
    - http_request: makes an HTTP request to an API and returns the status code and response body.
    - save_memory: saves a fact to persistent memory.
    - read_memory: reads a fact from persistent memory by its name.
The agent can use these functions to assist with coding tasks.
The agent can also use the functions to learn and remember new facts.
The project is designed to be flexible and adaptable to different tasks and situations.
The agent can use the functions to interact with the user and provide helpful responses.
The project includes a memory index to keep track of saved facts.
The memory index can be used to retrieve saved facts and use them to assist with tasks.
